title: Gintama
description:
In an alternate version of Edo-period Japan, aliens known as the Amanto have invaded Earth and taken control of the country, causing the samurai era to decline. Despite the ban on swords and the loss of traditional values, Gintoki Sakata, a lazy yet highly skilled samurai, continues living freely while running a small odd-jobs business called Yorozuya alongside Shinpachi Shimura and Kagura.

From ridiculous daily tasks and absurd comedy to emotional conflicts and intense battles, the Yorozuya constantly becomes involved in strange adventures with criminals, rebels, assassins, and powerful enemies. Although Gintoki often appears carefree and irresponsible, his hidden past as a legendary warrior slowly comes to light as dangerous threats begin targeting the people he cares about. Combining hilarious parody, action-packed fights, heartfelt drama, and unforgettable characters, Gintama delivers a unique story filled with comedy, friendship, and emotional moments.
